Uses of Package
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx

Packages that use nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Package
Description
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
 
  • Classes in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx used by nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
    Class
    Description
    Balance
    Represents the balance of an account at a specific point in time, as typically found in OFX financial data.
    BankAccountInfo
    Represents bank account information, commonly found in OFX data.
    BankMsgs
    Represents the banking messages section within an OFX response, specifically containing a statement transaction response.
    BankTransactionList
    Represents a list of bank account transactions for a specified period, as typically found in OFX financial data.
    FinancialInstitution
    Represents information about a financial institution as found in OFX data.
    OFX
    Represents the root element of an OFX (Open Financial Exchange) document.
    OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo
    Inner class to hold data for bank account information used in OFX sections.
    OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo
    Inner class to hold data for credit card account information used in OFX sections.
    OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData
    Inner class to hold data for investment account information used in OFX sections.
    OfxV2Writer.InvestmentPosition
    Describes a single investment holding, such as a stock or mutual fund position.
    OfxV2Writer.InvestmentTransactionData
    Describes a single investment transaction entry within the statement.
    OfxV2Writer.SecurityData
    Identifies a security referenced by investment transactions and positions.
    OfxV2Writer.SignonData
    Inner class to hold data for the OFX sign-on section.
    OfxV2Writer.TransactionData
    Inner class to hold data for a single transaction, used by the OFX writer methods.
    SecurityNode
    Represents a security, typically identified by an ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) and a ticker symbol.
    SignonMsgs
    Represents the Sign-On Messages (SIGNONMSGSRSV1) aggregate in an OFX response.
    SignonResponse
    Represents the Sign-On Response (SONRS) aggregate in an OFX file.
    StatementResponse
    Represents the Statement Response (STMTRS) aggregate in an OFX banking message.
    StatementTransactionResponse
    Represents the Statement Transaction Response (STMTTRNRS) aggregate in an OFX file.
    Status
    Represents the status of an OFX request or response.
    Transaction
    Represents a banking transaction for OFX export.
    TransactionType
    Defines the various types of financial transactions, particularly relevant for investment activities or specific accounting entries.
